name: Henan Mingtai Al.Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Henan Mingtai Al.Industrial Co.,Ltd. produces and sells aluminum products in China. It offers aluminum sheets, coils, checker plates, and foils. The company's products are used in high-speed rail train, Inter-city rail, aerospace, automobile manufacturing, architectural decoration, shipbuilding, packaging, electronic appliances, printing, and other industries. It also exports its products to approximately 100 countries worldwide. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Gongyi, China.
